easy.title: Sum of First N Integers
easy.description: Calculate sum of numbers 1 to N using a while loop.
easy.solution:
def sum_n(n):
    total = 0
    curr = 1
    while curr <= n:
        total += curr
        curr += 1
    return total

medium.title: Collatz Conjecture Steps
medium.description: Given N, if even divide by 2, if odd multiply by 3 and add 1. Count steps until N becomes 1.
hints: Use integer division // for even numbers

hard.title: Binary Conversion
hard.description: Convert non-negative integer N to its binary string representation using while loop division by 2.

debugging.title: Fix Infinite While Loop
bugs: `i += 1` increases i, making `i > 0` always True. Change to `i -= 1`.
